smapsActiveEntity.msgText: 131742Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 252/26. NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. 1. GUNNERY EXERCISES 141400Z TO 141600Z APR IN AREA BOUND BY 32-11.00N 117-17.30W, 31-35.00N 116-59.48W, 31-35.00N 117-34.00W, 32-05.00N 117-34.00W, 32-13.00N 117-32.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 141700Z APR 26.

131552Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 251/26. NORTH PACIFIC. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, SPACE DEBRIS 171341Z TO 171619Z APR, ALTERNATE 1341Z TO 1619Z DAILY 18 THRU 22 APR IN AREA BOUND BY: A. 46-59.00N 152-58.00W, 48-04.00N 152-45.00W, 47-48.00N 150-38.00W, 46-51.00N 144-48.00W, 46-16.00N 144-59.00W, 46-42.00N 148-57.00W. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 248/26 3. CANCEL THIS MSG 221719Z APR 26.
110218Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 247/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 161600Z TO 172200Z APR IN AREA WITHIN ONE MILE OF 32-35.82N 117-10.87W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 172300Z APR 26.

NAVAREA XII 246/26. 1. NAVAREA XII WARNINGS IN FORCE AS OF 102116Z APR. ALL THE INFORCE WARNINGS ARE LISTED HERE. 245/2026, 244/2026, 243/2026, 241/2026, 240/2026, 239/2026, 238/2026, 236/2026, 230/2026, 226/2026, 225/2026, 216/2026, 207/2026, 177/2026, 162/2026, 125/2026, 98/2026, 88/2026. 718/2025, 678/2025, 422/2025, 392/2025, 354/2025, 344/2025, 338/2025, 259/2025, 208/2025. 862/2024, 441/2024. 93/2023. 721/2022, 720/2022, 244/2022, 243/2022. 2. THE COMPLETE TEXT OF ALL IN-FORCE NAVAREA XII BROADCAST WARNINGS ARE AVAILABLE ON THE NGA MARITIME SAFETY INFORMATION WEBSITE AT: msi.nga.mil/NavWarnings. ALTERNATIVELY, THESE MAY BE REQUESTED BY E-MAIL FROM THE NAVAREA XII COORDINATOR AT NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL. 3. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 228/26.

092131Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 243/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 1630Z TO 2030Z DAILY 13 THRU 18 APR IN AREA BOUND BY 34-17.73N 120-52.53W, 33-58.85N 121-59.07W, 34-38.65N 122-26.05W, 35-04.67N 121-20.13W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 182130Z APR 26.

081515Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 238/26. NORTH PACIFIC. CALIFORNIA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING: A. 050239Z TO 050703Z APR, ALTERNATE 0239Z TO 0703Z DAILY 06 THRU 17 APR IN AREA BOUND BY 31-45.00N 121-09.00W, 31-43.00N 121-15.00W, 34-39.00N 120-40.00W, 34-40.00N 120-37.00W, 34-27.00N 120-26.00W, 33-47.00N 120-35.00W. B. 050239Z TO 050722Z APR, ALTERNATE 0239Z TO 0722Z DAILY 06 THRU 17 APR IN AREA BOUND BY 28-26.00N 121-34.00W, 28-19.00N 121-55.00W, 28-31.00N 122-13.00W, 28-52.00N 122-13.00W, 29-48.00N 121-45.00W, 29-48.00N 121-34.00W, 28-48.00N 121-25.00W. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 221/26. 3. CANCEL THIS MSG 170822Z APR 26.

030926Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 226/26. NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, SPACE DEBRIS 2143Z TO 2325Z DAILY 08 THRU 19 APR IN AREA BOUND BY 27-28.71N 171-24.34W, 13-38.98N 174-00.45W, 01-35.98N 175-48.45W, 00-54.72N 172-43.89W, 12-22.59N 170-40.14W, 16-45.76N 170-06.75W, 26-43.75N 168-39.09W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 200025Z APR 26.

021749Z APR 26 NAVAREA XII 225/26. NORTH PACIFIC. F/V DON MACA, 22 PERSONS ON BOARD, UNREPORTED. LAST KNOWN POSITION IN VICINITY 02-25.00N 095-20.00W AT 262300Z MAR. VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO KEEP A SHARP LOOKOUT, ASSIST IF POSSIBLE. REPORTS TO ANY COASTAL RADIO STATION.

280808Z MAR 26 NAVAREA XII 216/26. NORTH PACIFIC. WEATHER MESSAGE SERVICES INTERRUPTED AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. PT REYES 37-55.00N 122-24.00W. B. HONOLULU 21-22.00N 158-09.00W. C. KODIAK 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. D. NOME 64-29.00N 165-15.00W. E. COLD BAY 55-11.00N 162-42.00W. F. ST PAUL 57-09.00N 170-14.00W. G. SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E. H. PT HIGGINS 55-27.00N 131-49.00W. I. ASTORIA 46-10.00N 123-49.00W. J. BERING SEA 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. K. CAMBRIA 33-44N 118-24W.

270835Z MAR 26 NAVAREA XII 207/26. GULF OF PANAMA. NORTH PACIFIC. PANAMA. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE BY CABLESHIP ILE DE SEIN ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 05-32.79N 079-31.24W, 05-40.47N 079-30.76W, 06-16.99N 079-27.45W, 06-46.26N 079-13.27W, 07-09.26N 078-43.60W, 07-42.97N 078-50.36W, 08-10.96N 079-11.60W, 08-46.69N 079-14.41W, 08-55.85N 079-24.36W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
141713Z MAR 26 NAVAREA XII 177/26(19). NORTH PACIFIC. UNITED STATES. HAWAII. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY HONOLULU (NMO) IN 21-22.00N 158-09.00W. ALL HF/MF AND DSC SERVICES ARE INOPERABLE.
100104Z MAR 26 NAVAREA XII 162/26(17). NORTH PACIFIC. CANADA. NAVTEX STATION DIGBY ISLAND (D) 54-17.85N 130-25.10W OFF AIR.
252035Z FEB 26 NAVAREA XII 125/26(16). ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY COLD BAY 55-11.00N 162-42.00W. HF TRANSMIT AND RECEIVE SERVICES OFF AIR.
171634Z FEB 26 NAVAREA XII 98/26(16). BERING SEA. ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E HF TRANSMIT AND RECEIVE SERVICES INOPERATIVE.

112030Z FEB 26 NAVAREA XII 88/26(GEN). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. DSC SERVICES UNAVAILABLE AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. HONOLULU (O) 21-26.00N 158-09.00W. B. PT REYES (C) 37-56.00N 122-44.00W. C. KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W.
132105Z NOV 25 NAVAREA XII 718/25(16). GULF OF ALASKA. 1. WEATHER FAX SERVICES OFF AIR AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 460/24.
141418Z JUL 25 NAVAREA XII 422/25(16). BERING STRAIT. ALASKA. SCIENTIFIC MOORINGS, AT DEPTH 15 METERS, ESTABLISHED IN: A. 65-46.86N 168-34.07W. B. 65-44.76N 168-15.75W.

242359Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 392/25(16). NORTH PACIFIC. M/V MORNING MIDAS SANK IN 45-16.88N 179-14.13W. VESSELS IN VICINITY REQUESTED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION AND REPORT PRESENCE OF OIL SHEENS OR DEBRIS TO USCG SECTOR WESTERN ALASKA AND US ARCTIC, PHONE: 907 428 4100, E-MAIL: SOUTHWESTERNAK@USCG.MIL.

130011Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 354/25(GEN). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MESSAGING SERVICES UNRELIABLE AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. PT REYES (C) 37-55.50N 122-43.90W. B. HONOLULU (O) 21-26.00N 158-09.00W. C. KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W. D. ASTORIA (W) 46-10.00N 123-49.00W. E. CAMBRIA (Q) 33-44.00N 118-24.00W.
100619Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 344/25(16). BERING SEA. ALASKA. COMMDET KODIAK, AK REMOTE SITE SHEMYA 52-43.00N 174-07.00E HF R/T SERVICES OFF AIR.
071202Z JUN 25 NAVAREA XII 338/25(18). OREGON. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY ASTORIA (W) 46-10.00N 123-49.00W OFF AIR.
051901Z MAY 25 NAVAREA XII 259/25(16). GULF OF ALASKA. ALASKA. USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITY KODIAK (J) 57-46.00N 152-34.00W HF AND DSC SERVICES UNRELIABLE.
061220Z APR 25 NAVAREA XII 208/25(22). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. COLOMBIA. PUNTA SOLDADO LIGHT 03-48.50N 077-10.80W DISCONTINUED.

281257Z OCT 24 NAVAREA XII 862/24(83). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. KIRIBATI. CABLE OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE IN VICINITY OF TRACKLINE JOINING 02-01.46N 157-29.67W, 02-01.45N 157-29.69W, 02-01.45N 157-29.72W, 02-01.42N 157-29.82W, 02-01.36N 157-30.04W, 02-01.22N 157-30.29W, 02-00.20N 157-32.23W. 100 METER BERTH REQUESTED.
182355Z JUN 24 NAVAREA XII 441/24(21). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. MORRO SANTO DOMINGO LIGHT 28-14.37N 114-06.18W UNLIT.

282248Z FEB 23 NAVAREA XII 93/23(19). NORTH PACIFIC. HAWAII. 1. INTERMITTENT MISSILE FIRING OPERATIONS CONDUCTED BY THE PACIFIC MISSILE RANGE FACILITY (PMRF), BARKING SANDS, KAUAI, HAWAII, IN WHISKEY 188 (W-188) OPERATING AREA. OPERATIONS ARE CONDUCTED PERIODICALLY THROUGHOUT EACH WEEK IN AREA BOUND BY 22-00.0N 159-51.0W, 22-00.0N 160-00.0W, 22-04.0N 160-06.0W, 21-59.5N 160-21.0W, 22-05.0N 161-35.0W, 22-45.0N 161-25.0W, 22-56.0N 161-49.0W, 23-34.0N 161-18.6W, 23-57.0N 160-41.0W, 25-41.0N 161-36.0W, 26-00.0N 159-58.0W, 25-47.0N 158-15.0W, 23-54.0N 158-15.0W, 22-20.0N 159-09.0W, 22-21.0N 159-30.0W, 22-13.0N 159-42.0W, 22-00.0N 159-51.0W. 2. VESSELS MAY BE REQUESTED TO ALTER COURSE DUE TO FIRING OPERATIONS AND ARE REQUESTED TO CONTACT "PACIFIC MISSILE RANGE BARKING SANDS" ON VHF MARINE BAND CHANNEL 16 PRIOR TO ENTERING THE ABOVE BOUNDARIES. IF UNABLE TO CONTACT PMRF PRIOR TO ENTERING OR WHILE IN THE WARNING AREA, RELAY MESSAGES THROUGH U.S. COAST GUARD HONOLULU. 3. VESSELS INBOUND AND OUTBOUND FOR HAWAIIAN PORTS WILL CREATE THE LEAST INTERFERENCE TO FIRING OPERATIONS AS WELL AS ENHANCE VESSEL SAFETY BY PASSING SOUTH OF THE ISLANDS OF KAUAI AND NIIHAU DURING SPECIFIED TIMES. 4. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 269/21.
272221Z SEP 22 NAVAREA XII 721/22(21). EL SALVADOR. CHART 21524 MOORING BUOYS 13-35.23N 089-51.10W UNLIT.
272211Z SEP 22 NAVAREA XII 720/22(21). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. EL SALVADOR. CHART 12529. PUERTO DE LA UNION 16 BUOY 13-20.36N 087-48.99W UNLIT.

MSGID/GENADMIN/NGA NAVSAFETY WASHINGTON DC// RMKS/ NAVAREA XII 243/22(18). EASTERN NORTH PACIFIC. MEXICO. CHART 18740. 1. CORONADO ISLAND SOUTH LIGHT 32-23.5N 117-14.5W UNLIT. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XII 159/21.
